title: Team Worker Account Profiles
scope: Allow Team runs to select an account profile.
Preserve session binding when recovering a worker.
Record profile usage in trace evidence.
non_goals: Do not add automatic account rotation by default.
Do not resume a guessed newest session.
Do not hide account profile selection inside advanced settings only.

tasks.title: Add account profile selector to worker draft
tasks.details: Allow Team orchestration drafts to bind workers to an account profile.

tasks.title: Add account profile preflight
tasks.details: Validate selected account, CLI availability, token health, and workspace path.

tasks.title: Record run metadata
tasks.details: Record profile id, auth source, token health, and session binding in run metadata.

tasks.title: Add session-bound recovery guard
tasks.details: Resume only the session id bound to the current worker run.

tasks.title: Add trace evidence for account profile usage
tasks.details: Emit trace events when a worker selects, validates, or switches account profile.

acceptance: Team task evidence records which account profile was used.
Recovery does not guess from newest session.
User can inspect profile and run binding in the drawer.
Token health failures block worker launch with a clear reason.

implementation_notes.summary: Preserved `account_profile_id` through Team orchestration worker draft normalization and DAG node conversion, passed it into codex worker launch metadata, and surfaced it on launched worker runtime records for run replay/review.

Fixed scheduler launch payload to expose `account_profile_id` as a top-level field (`payload.account_profile_id`) while preserving existing nested `payload.node` usage so launch callbacks and test interceptors can consistently derive profile metadata.

Added conservative Team launch preflight that rejects invalid workspaces and unknown/blocked account profiles before spawn, and validates codex CLI availability. Persisted launch blocker reasons now use preflight kind (`team_workspace_missing`, `team_workspace_invalid`, `team_account_profile_not_found`, `team_account_token_blocked`) when available. Added regression coverage for missing profile and blocked-token-health preflight in `src/host/team-coordination.test.js`.

Persisted per-launch account metadata into DAG worker runtime and Team task runtime records: `account_profile_id`, normalized auth source path, token health, and a `session_binding` object keyed by run/node/thread. The Team launch wrapper now enriches launch results from account state while still enforcing preflight for injected worker launch stubs.

Hardened same-thread retry recovery to honor persisted session binding. When a prior run recorded `session_binding.worker_thread_id`, retry-in-same-thread now targets only that exact session and fails closed instead of falling back to `task.owner` or another available thread.

Added dedicated Team trace evidence for account-profile usage during orchestration launch: successful account-bound workers emit `orchestration.account_profile_bound`, while account-profile preflight blocks emit `orchestration.account_profile_launch_blocked` with node id, profile id, auth-source path, token health, and session-binding payloads where available.
